name: Vermont Sweet & Sour Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender on high speed, beat the eggs.
2. Gradually add the sugar, salt, pepper, celery salt, and garlic powder to the blender while continuing to blend.
3. Drizzle in 2-3 ounces of salad oil until the mixture thickens.
4. Add the remaining salad oil and white vinegar alternately, blending continuously.
5. Slowly incorporate the maple syrup, ensuring it is well combined.
6. Keep the dressing refrigerated.
Makes approximately 7 cups.
